# Buildora Web Design Agency

> High-performance custom web design, local SEO, and fast websites for local businesses.

## Overview
Buildora is a modern web design agency specializing in bespoke, high-converting websites for small businesses, contractors, salons, medspas, restaurants, professional services, and local brands.

- **Website**: https://www.buildorawebdesign.com
- **Phone**: (437) 784-9500
- **Email**: contact@buildora.ca
- **Turnaround**: 3–10 business days

## Core Offerings & Pricing

### 1. Starter Plan ($399 setup + $49/mo)
- Best for simple 1–3 page starter setups, landing pages, and small service businesses.
- Includes mobile responsive design, SSL hosting, contact form, and standard performance optimization.

### 2. Professional Plan ($999 setup + $109/mo)
- Best for established small businesses, salons, contractors, restaurants, and local services competing on Google.
- Up to 10 custom designed pages.
- Local SEO schema markup, lead form workflows, Google Business Profile assistance, and speed optimization.

### 3. Custom Scope ($1,499+ setup + $179/mo)
- Best for multi-location businesses, custom booking CRM integrations (Jane App, Mindbody, Boulevard, Fresha), e-commerce, and advanced portals.

### 4. Free Custom Homepage Mockup
- Buildora offers a risk-free custom homepage design preview before signing contracts or paying upfront setup fees.

## Tech Stack & Architecture
- Modern React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, high-speed Edge CDN.
- Ultra-fast page speeds (95+ Lighthouse performance scores).
- Built-in schema.org structured data for local search visibility.

## Target Industries
- Salons & Barbershops
- Nail Salons & Medspas
- General Contractors, Roofers, Plumbers, Electricians
- Restaurants & Cafes
- Lawyers & Accountants
- Real Estate Agencies & Gyms
